structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Reheat Zone – Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate cooling SAT reset requests based on zone temperature deviation: 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C for 2 min; 2 requests if by 2°C for 2 min; 1 request if cooling loop >95% until <85%; 0 otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes (after suppression).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests. Else if by 2°C for 2 min, send 2 requests. Else if cooling loop >95%, send 1 request until <85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Cooling SAT Reset Requests a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, map cooling loop output to active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum to cooling maximum. If AHU SAT > room temperature, limit airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling loop output to airflow setpoint between cooling minimum and cooling maximum. If AHU SAT > room temp, cap at minimum. Disable heating coil unless DAT < minimum setpoint.
